title: EnderSMP
body:
# EnderSMP


This modpack is light-weight and focused on create mod and it's addons (see them in mods section).
Modpack also has Pam's HarvestCraft 2 mods. That allows for bigger food variety .
You can also find decoration mods to decorate your home, base (see them in mods section).
Quality of life mods are also in this pack to help you finish your jobs easier. 
In case your world becomes boring and uninteresting we added animals mod - Naturalist so it would never be boring again!
For better communication with other players if you are playing multiplayer, we added Voice Chat mod so you can communicate with others not with chat - but with your voice.
We also added mod clumps, so you won't get bad framerates because of experience orbs that are laying on the ground.
We know the pain when you don't have enough space in one chest and have to place another one. Not anymore! We added Sophisticated Storage mod witch allows to upgrade barrels, chests and even shulkers. Also when you upgrade your chosen storage type you can put other upgrades inside it, for example to expand max stack size.

We hope you enjoy this pack and find it interesting!


This modpack was mainly created for EnderSMP, but it doesn't mean that you don't have to try it!
*EnderSMP discord server can be found in links section or you can click [here](https://discord.gg/czc8Zff73B/).*


---


<details>
<summary>Legal stuff</summary>

Modpack includes [Corpse mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse).

</details>




---

- Minimum Ram Recommendation - 6GB
- Average Ram Recommendation - 8-12GB
